steps.title: Check Your Eligibility
steps.description: Verify you meet the requirements to vote
details: You must be a U.S. citizen
You must be at least 18 years old by Election Day
You must meet your state's residency requirements
In most states, you cannot be serving a felony sentence (rules vary by state)
steps.action: Review eligibility requirements for your state

steps.title: Gather Required Documents
steps.description: Collect the information you'll need to register
details: Driver's license or state ID number
steps.action: Have your ID and personal information ready

steps.title: Complete Your Registration
details: Online: Use your state's online registration portal (fastest method)
By mail: Download, print, and mail the National Mail Voter Registration Form
In person: Visit your local election office or DMV
You'll receive confirmation once your registration is processed
steps.action: Choose a registration method and submit your application

steps.title: Verify Your Registration
steps.description: Confirm you're registered and your information is correct
details: Check your registration status 1-2 weeks after applying
Verify your name, address, and polling location
Update your registration if you move or change your name
Re-register if your status shows as inactive
steps.action: Use your state's voter lookup tool to verify registration
